title: GrowGeneration (GRWG) Q1 2023 Earnings Beat Estimates, Dip Y/Y
text: GrowGeneration Corp. (GRWG) reported a loss per share of 10 cents in the first quarter of 2023, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of a loss of 11 cents per share. GrowGeneration generated revenues of $56.8 million in first-quarter 2023, which declined 30.5% year over year. The top line surpassed the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $55.9 million. Comparable store sales in the quarter slumped 36.6% from the prior year at its 55 retail locations and e-commerce operations. The results reflect the ongoing weakness in the cannabis industry. GrowGeneration expects revenues between $250 million and $270 million in 2023. Full-year adjusted EBITDA is expected to come within negative $4 million to a positive $1 million.
